hero.title: Where Every Story is
hero.subtitle: VIDEO ACCESSIBILITY PLATFORM DESIGNED FOR YOUR BUSINESS
hero.headline: Build something better.
hero.description: Create inclusive experiences that meet WCAG and EAA/ADA standards, thanks to the leading platform in digital accessibility and the support of expert services.

inclusivity.title: Inclusivity comes standard
inclusivity.description: Everything from customizable captions to high-contrast colors are baked into every video host with Axessible, so accessibility isn't something you have to think about. It's just the way your videos are.

whyWeExist.title: Because most videos leave someone out.
whyWeExist.description: On other platforms, videos are easy to share - but not always easy to experience.
whyWeExist.audioDescriptionsRare: Audio descriptions are rare or robotic.
whyWeExist.belief: We believe access isn't a feature. It's the future of storytelling.

axessibleExperience.title: Video without barriers.
axessibleExperience.captionsDesc: More than words. Dynamic, expressive captions that move, pause, and flow with emotion.
axessibleExperience.audioDescDesc: Not robotic - but cinematic narration that paints the scene, so those who listen feel everything.
axessibleExperience.signLanguageTitle: Work with us to create Sign Language Descriptions for your videos
axessibleExperience.signLanguageDesc: Driven by experts, making inclusion natural.
axessibleExperience.playerDesc: Designed for everyone: adjust text size, color, playback, narration speed - all in one simple player.

forViewers.title: Delight in a richer way to watch.
forViewers.description: Axessible isn't just for people with disabilities. It's for anyone who loves stories:

forCreators.title: Turn your videos into experiences everyone can share.
forCreators.description: Upload your content — and our platform transforms it with:
forCreators.compliance: Automatic compliance with global accessibility standards
forCreators.storiesReach: So your stories don't just reach more people…

community.title: A platform built with - not just for - the community.
community.collaborate: We collaborate with deaf, blind, and disabled creators, educators, and advocates to design every feature.
community.everyVideo: Every video added here helps make the internet more inclusive.
community.buildingLibrary: Together, we're building a library of stories that everyone can truly experience.
community.visionaries: From global brands to indie creators, these are the visionaries who believe access isn't an afterthought - it's the future of video.
community.meetPioneers: Meet the Pioneers of Inclusive Storytelling

testimonials.title: See What Our Viewers Are Saying
testimonials.testimonial1: I never realized captions could feel this alive.
testimonials.testimonial2: Audio descriptions here are like poetry - they pull you deeper into the story.
testimonials.testimonial3: Watching on Axessible feels better, whether you rely on accessibility or not.

cta.title: Access isn't optional. It's storytelling reimagined.
cta.subtitle: Join the platform where every story belongs.

footer.tagline: Hear the Unheard. See the Unseen.
footer.copyright: © 2025 Axessible Tech, INC. All rights reserved.

industryFirst.title: Multi-Modal Video Accessibility Engine
industryFirst.description: Where competitors offer point solutions, Axessible delivers end-to-end automation. Our patent-pending platform transforms video accessibility from compliance burden to competitive advantage.

aiSync.title: Patent-Pending AI Synchronization
aiSync.description: Advanced neural networks ensure perfect timing between visual content and accessibility features.

emotionalCaptions.title: Emotional Intelligence Captions
emotionalCaptions.description: Context-aware captions with tone detection and visual styling for enhanced comprehension.

industryFirst.quote: "We don't just enhance video—we future-proof it."
